Title: DICTIONARY
Description: The dictionary structure consists of attributes. Dictionary attributes are specified similarly to table columns. The only required attribute property is its type, all other properties may have default values.
ON CLUSTERclause allows creating dictionary on a cluster, seeDistributed DDL.
Depending on dictionarylayoutone or more attributes can be specified as dictionary keys.
The source for a dictionary can be a:
When using the SQL console inClickHouse Cloud, you must specify a user (defaultor any other user with the roledefault_role) and password when creating a dictionary.
